Should a comet touch the Seven Sages (the Great Bear),
Abhijit, the Pole Star and Jyestha, it would destroy the clouds as
well as works and people's health, and cause sorrow to them. Should
it touch Aslesa, there would undoubtedly be drought and conse-
quently the people, troubled by their famished children, would run
hither and thither for relief and perish ultimately.
[The metre is
^ ii^n
When Saturn passes through the 'Front Gates* viz. the seven
stars commencing with Krttika, and becomes retrograde, there will
be a dreadful and long-drawn famine, drought and hostilities among
friends,
